_description: SimpleLTC API Data Intake - ready to wire when API access is granted
_activationChecklist: 1. Obtain SimpleLTC API key/credentials from Netsmart
2. Create a Custom Connector in Power Automate for SimpleLTC API
3. Add connection reference to the Healthcare Agents Foundation V2 solution
4. Build the flow actions: authenticate, query facility QM data, query resident data
5. Store results in Dataverse tasks table with subject Facility insight submission (facility) or Resident insight intake (resident)
6. Wire the flow to the QM Orchestrator topic as an alternative to manual upload
7. Add a scheduled trigger (recurrence) for automated bi-weekly pulls
8. Test end-to-end: API pull then Dataverse store then agent lookup then analysis

facilityQmData.description: Facility-level QM scores, Five-Star predictions, measure-level rates

residentQmData.description: Resident-level MDS data, QM measure membership, outlier indicators
